# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

services:
  - name: users-service
    url: http://users-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        paths:
          - /api/users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE

  - name: orders-service
    url: http://orders-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        paths:
          - /api/orders
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    targets:
      - target: users-service:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    targets:
      - target: orders-service:8080
        weight: 100

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    service: users-service
    config:
      second: 5
      hour: 1000

  - name: cors
    service: orders-service
    config:
      origins: 
        - "*"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
      headers:
        - "Content-Type" 
        - "Authorization"
